context: Tests whether the agent correctly handles a Vite+ version upgrade by distinguishing between the global CLI upgrade surface and the project-local migration surface, using current vp migrate behavior, removing the obsolete test wrapper, classifying direct Vitest usage, and performing the correct end-to-end validation sequence.

checklist.name: vp upgrade for global CLI
checklist.description: The upgrade procedure includes `vp upgrade` to update the global `vp` binary on the machine â€” distinct from updating the project-local package

checklist.name: Global before local
checklist.description: The global `vp upgrade` step appears before (or is documented as separate from) the project-local `vp migrate` step â€” the two surfaces are not conflated into a single operation

checklist.name: vp migrate for local stack
checklist.description: The project-local upgrade uses `vp migrate` from the project root so Vite+ updates the local `vite-plus` package and related toolchain pins together

checklist.name: Core alias verified
checklist.description: The procedure verifies that `vp migrate` updated the `vite` -> `npm:@voidzero-dev/vite-plus-core@<matching-version>` alias in the manifest, catalog or override, and lockfile importer before calling the upgrade done

checklist.name: Removed obsolete test wrapper
checklist.description: The procedure removes `@voidzero-dev/vite-plus-test` from dependencies, overrides/catalogs/resolutions, source references, and lockfile state instead of updating the removed wrapper

checklist.name: vp outdated for verification
checklist.description: The procedure uses `vp outdated` to confirm that all Vite+ packages are now at the intended release (not `npm outdated`, `pnpm outdated`, or omitted entirely)

checklist.name: Direct Vitest usage classified
checklist.description: The upgrade distinguishes node-mode-only projects from projects that directly use `vitest`, `@vitest/*`, coverage/UI packages, or browser providers, and only keeps direct upstream Vitest dependencies for the latter

checklist.name: vp env current in validation
checklist.description: The end-to-end validation sequence includes `vp env current` as the first check

checklist.name: Full validation sequence
checklist.description: The validation sequence includes all of: `vp install`, `vp check`, and `vp test` (in addition to `vp env current`)

checklist.name: Build validation included
checklist.description: The validation sequence includes `vp build` or `vp pack` (as appropriate for the project type) to verify build artifacts after the upgrade

checklist.name: No direct package manager for Vite+ packages
checklist.description: The upgrade steps do NOT use `npm install`, `pnpm update`, `yarn upgrade`, or other direct package-manager commands for the Vite+ packages â€” the local Vite+ stack moves through `vp migrate`
